name: azure
description: Azure cloud infrastructure management — Virtual Machines, AKS, Storage, and Resource Groups

tools.name: list_resource_groups
tools.description: List all resource groups in the subscription

tools.name: list_virtual_machines
tools.description: List virtual machines, optionally filtered by resource group

tools.name: get_vm_instance_view
tools.description: Get detailed status and instance view for a virtual machine

tools.name: manage_virtual_machine
tools.description: Start, stop, deallocate, or restart a virtual machine

tools.name: list_aks_clusters
tools.description: List AKS Kubernetes clusters, optionally filtered by resource group

tools.name: describe_aks_cluster
tools.description: Get details of an AKS cluster including Kubernetes version, node pools, and FQDN
